title_en: Homemade vs. Store-Bought Salsa: Sweet or Spicy?
title_es: Salsa Casera vs. Comprada: ¿Dulce o Picante?
hook_en: Is your salsa sweet or spicy? Let's find out!
hook_es: ¿Tu salsa es dulce o picante? ¡Vamos a descubrirlo!
key_message: Homemade salsa is healthier with no added sugars unlike many store-bought salsas.
visual_elements: split screen of homemade salsa ingredients vs. store-bought jar
close-up of nutrition labels showing sugars
comparison of vibrant homemade vs. dull store-bought salsa
taste test with exaggerated sweet vs. spicy reaction
_source_food_context: • HEALTHY: Fresh homemade salsa (tomatoes, onion, cilantro, lime) vs. PROCESSED: Store-bought salsa (high fructose corn syrup, artificial colors) — Store-bought salsa can contain up to 4g added sugar per serving

hook_en: Which salsa reigns supreme? Fresh or processed?
hook_es: ¿Qué salsa es la mejor? ¿Fresca o procesada?
key_message: Fresh salsa is packed with natural flavors and nutrients, while processed versions often hide unwanted additives.
visual_elements: pouring both salsas into clear bowls
label highlighting artificial colors in store-bought salsa
close-up of dipping chip in each salsa with reaction
_source_food_context: • HEALTHY: Fresh homemade salsa (tomatoes, onion, cilantro, lime) vs. PROCESSED: Store-bought salsa (high fructose corn syrup, artificial colors) — Store-bought salsa can contain up to 4g added sugar per serving
